# Akro Ventures

> Capital advisory for Indian founders and a curated deal network for investors. Core thesis: right founder, right capital, right investor.

Akro Ventures pairs Indian founders with the right capital and connects investors to curated, pre-vetted deal flow. Strategy first, paperwork second. Zero upfront fees, RBI compliant. Since 2023: ₹200Cr+ facilitated, 50+ founders served, 40+ lender relationships.

## For Founders

Business loans, startup fundraising, and capital structuring for Indian founders and growing businesses.

- Unsecured and secured business loans, matched to cashflow and business profile, no collateral required for working capital.
- Startup fundraising from pre-seed to growth stage: narrative, financial model, and investor targeting.
- FDI (Foreign Direct Investment) and ECB (External Commercial Borrowing) advisory with RBI/FEMA compliance.
- Export factoring: up to 90% of export invoice value unlocked on day zero, collateral-free and non-recourse.
- Project and structured funding with milestone-based drawdowns for large-scale builds.
- Loan readiness audit: a free assessment of where a founder stands before applying, with a structured action plan.

Full details: https://akroventures.com/founders

## For Investors

Curated, pre-vetted deal flow for angel investors, HNIs, family offices, NBFCs, and institutional investors.

- Every deal is originated and diligenced by Akro directly, not submitted by the startup.
- Full deal memos: sector, stage, deal size, business model, traction, and Akro's diligence notes.
- Optional co-investment alongside Akro on select deals.
- Portfolio monitoring dashboard for tracking investments post-close.
- Ticket sizes from ₹50L to ₹50Cr+, across early-stage equity and structured credit.
- No fee to join the network. Vetting (KYC, financial background, investment history) typically takes 5-7 business days.

Full details: https://akroventures.com/investors

## Company

Akro Ventures was founded by Rohit Jain (Co-Founder & CEO, former Finance Head at a 1,000-crore company) and Akshita Chahande (Co-Founder & CTO). The company's differentiator: most advisors hand over a report and step away; Akro stays involved from the first conversation through deal close.

Full story and team: https://akroventures.com/about

## Other pages

- Insights (articles on fundraising, deal structuring, and market views): https://akroventures.com/insights
- Contact: https://akroventures.com/contact
